scripts.frames: mkdir -p public/frames/footer public/frames/footer/sm && ffmpeg -y -i asset/footer.mp4 -vf scale=1920:-2:flags=lanczos -q:v 4 -start_number 1 public/frames/footer/%04d.jpg && ffmpeg -y -i asset/footer.mp4 -vf scale=960:-2:flags=lanczos -q:v 5 -start_number 1 public/frames/footer/sm/%04d.jpg
